2604.16941.title: MEMRES: A Memory-Augmented Resolver with Confidence Cascade for Agentic Python Dependency Resolution
2604.16941.paper_summary: We present MEMRES, an agentic system for Python dependency resolution that introduces a multi-level confidence cascade where the LLM serves as the last resort. Our system combines: (1) a Self-Evolving Memory that accumulates reusable resolution patterns via tips and shortcuts; (2) an Error Pattern Knowledge Base with 200+ curated import-to-package mappings; (3) a Semantic Import Analyzer; and (4) a Python 2 heuristic detector resolving the largest failure category. On HG2.9K using Gemma-2 9B (10 GB VRAM). MEMRES resolves 2503 of 2890 (86.6%, 10-run average) snippets, combining intra-session memory with our confidence cascade for the remainder. This already exceeds PLLM's 54.7% overall success rate by a wide margin.
2604.16941.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了MEMRES，一個用於Python依賴解析的代理系統，它引入了一個多層次的信心級聯，其中LLM作為最後的手段。<lb/>我們的系統結合了：(1) 一個自我演化的記憶，通過提示和捷徑累積可重用的解析模式；(2) 一個擁有200多個精心策劃的導入到包映射的錯誤模式知識庫；(3) 一個語義導入分析器；以及(4) 一個解析最大失敗類別的Python 2啟發式檢測器。<lb/>在HG2.9K上使用Gemma-2 9B（10 GB VRAM）。MEMRES解析了2890個片段中的2503個（86.6%，10次運行平均），將會話內記憶與我們的信心級聯結合，處理剩餘的片段。<lb/>這已經大幅超過PLLM的54.7%整體成功率。
2604.16941.author: Dao Sy Duy Minh et.al.
2604.16941.authors: Dao Sy Duy Minh, Tran Chi Nguyen, Trung Kiet Huynh, Pham Phu Hoa, Nguyen Lam Phu Quy, Vu Nguyen
